div.h1: Data Flow: SIMD memset (16-byte SSE/AVX Implementation)
div.p: Objective: Fill memory at dest with byte c using aligned 128-bit vector stores. Performance Target: Throughput @ ~1 cycle per 16 bytes on aligned regions.
Target: Align dest to 16B Method: rep stosb or loop Range: [dest, dest + prologue_len)
Target: Maximize Throughput Instruction: _mm_store_si128 (MOVDQA) Register: xmm0 = _mm_set1_epi8(c) Stride: 16 Bytes / Iteration
Target: Finalize Tail (0-15 Bytes) Range: [vec_end, dest + count)
